svg.title: AI-Powered 2D-to-3D Video Conversion Pipeline
svg.desc: Six-stage pipeline from upload through AI processing on GPU workers to delivery, with monitoring and tech stack.

g.text: Tech: CUDA • PyTorch • FFmpeg • depth models • image warping

svg.text: Monitoring: logs • metrics • GPU monitoring • alerts • dashboard
Tech stack: Python • PyTorch • FFmpeg • Redis • RunPod • cloud storage
